category_sources: Official Fedora package page describes tmpwatch as recursively removing old files from directories such as /tmp.
source_facts.description says tmpwatch finds and removes files not accessed in a specified time.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Pagure project for tmpwatch.
docs_sources: Official Pagure repository contains the tmpwatch.8 manual page; Pagure access was partially protected, but Fedora identifies Pagure as upstream.
repo_sources: Official Fedora package page lists https://pagure.io/tmpwatch as upstream.
tags_sources: Official Fedora package page says tmpwatch removes files based on last access time.
source_facts.description supports cleanup and filesystem tags.
